title: hieracium caesium subsp. reclinatum
intro: Hieracium caesium subsp. reclinatum, also known as the lesser hawkbit, is a flowering plant species belonging to the dandelion family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Hieracium caesium subsp. reclinatum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies and herbal medicine.
